generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed in the harbor environment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance HoistSwingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for IoT communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for DT services deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for gantry crane control and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microcontroller for sensor and actuator control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores and manages historical crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingAction
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of crane operations using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight, ExecuteTrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane trajectories for testing and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulation data for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight, ThresholdBreachesAction
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages MQTT communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies faults through time series classification techniques"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimizes crane movement paths for efficiency and safety"
]

instance ThresholdBreachesAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers operational adjustments when sensor thresholds are breached"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizes current crane state and sensor data in real-time"
]

instance ExecuteTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes planned trajectories on physical crane actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validates trajectory feasibility through simulation"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital twin"
]

instance DataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Stores sensor data into time-series database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement along crane frame"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist vertical movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling at hoist end"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service transmitted through the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface, which controls the motors and electromagnet for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time continuous synchronization with data logging and validation performed at operational speeds, where measurements and simulations are compared continuously during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical crane hardware, Python-based control and logging applications, Docker-containerized services (database, dashboard, MQTT), and digital twin services (trajectory generation, simulation, validation) working in a centralized architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, supporting continuous validation and fault detection during real-time crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulated trajectories using distance metrics and threshold checks to ensure model validity during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication; Python interface for physical crane control; TimescaleDB for data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized components (database, MQTT broker, Grafana dashboard) deployed on a single personal computer via docker-compose."
]
